functions.name: RemoveAllWidgets
functions.description: Removes all widgets from the viewport.

functions.name: ProjectWorldLocationToWidgetPosition
functions.description: Gets the projected world to screen position for a player, then converts it into a widget

functions.name: GetViewportWidgetGeometry
functions.description: Gets the geometry of the widget holding all widgets added to the "Viewport".  You

functions.name: GetViewportSize
functions.description: Gets the size of the game viewport.

functions.name: GetViewportScale
functions.description: Gets the current DPI Scale being applied to the viewport and all the Widgets.

functions.name: GetPlayerScreenWidgetGeometry
functions.description: Gets the geometry of the widget holding all widgets added to the "Player Screen". You

functions.name: GetMousePositionScaledByDPI
functions.description: Gets the mouse position of the player controller, scaled by the DPI.  If you're trying to go from raw mouse screenspace coordinates

functions.name: GetMousePositionOnViewport
functions.description: Gets the platform's mouse cursor position in the local space of the viewport widget.

functions.name: GetMousePositionOnPlatform
functions.description: Gets the platform's mouse cursor position.  This is the 'absolute' desktop location of the mouse.
